# wc2026.cool — World Cup 2026 prediction game

> Free, no sign-up. Multilingual (English / 中文 / Español / Português / Deutsch / Français). Public forecasting data + a 10,000-run Monte Carlo model, refreshed hourly. For entertainment only — virtual points, nothing redeemable.

## Key pages
- https://www.wc2026.cool/ — home: today's matches and predictions
- https://www.wc2026.cool/forecast — advancement and title probabilities (live model)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/calculator — third-place qualification scenario calculator
- https://www.wc2026.cool/rules — 2026 World Cup format and qualification rules explained (48 teams, 12 groups, 8 best thirds)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/calculator/group/a — Group A: who advances (groups a through l)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/watch — official broadcast guide
- https://www.wc2026.cool/sitemap.xml — full index of every team and match page (48 teams + all fixtures, with per-team chance to advance/win and per-match prediction + most likely scores)

## 中文页面 / Chinese pages (zh-Hans)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/ — 首页：今日比赛与预测
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/forecast — 出线概率与夺冠概率（实时模型）
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/forecast/best-thirds — 最佳第三名排名（前 8 晋级）
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/calculator — 第三名出线场景计算器
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/rules — 2026 世界杯赛制与出线规则详解（48 队，12 组，8 个最佳第三名）
- https://www.wc2026.cool/zh/watch — 官方转播观赛指南

## Páginas en español / Spanish pages (es)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/es/ — inicio: partidos y predicciones de hoy
- https://www.wc2026.cool/es/forecast — probabilidades de avance y de título (modelo en vivo)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/es/forecast/best-thirds — ranking de los mejores terceros (los 8 primeros avanzan)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/es/calculator — calculadora de escenarios de clasificación de terceros
- https://www.wc2026.cool/es/rules — formato y reglas de clasificación del Mundial 2026 (48 equipos, 12 grupos, 8 mejores terceros)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/es/watch — guía oficial de transmisión

## Páginas em português / Portuguese pages (pt)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/pt/ — início: jogos e previsões de hoje
- https://www.wc2026.cool/pt/forecast — probabilidades de avanço e de título (modelo ao vivo)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/pt/forecast/best-thirds — ranking dos melhores terceiros (os 8 primeiros avançam)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/pt/calculator — calculadora de cenários de classificação de terceiros
- https://www.wc2026.cool/pt/rules — formato e regras de classificação da Copa 2026 (48 seleções, 12 grupos, 8 melhores terceiros)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/pt/watch — guia oficial de transmissão

## Deutsche Seiten / German pages (de)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/de/ — Startseite: heutige Spiele und Vorhersagen
- https://www.wc2026.cool/de/forecast — Wahrscheinlichkeiten für Weiterkommen und Titel (Live-Modell)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/de/forecast/best-thirds — Rangliste der besten Dritten (Top 8 weiter)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/de/calculator — Szenario-Rechner für die Qualifikation der Gruppendritten
- https://www.wc2026.cool/de/rules — Format und Qualifikationsregeln der WM 2026 (48 Teams, 12 Gruppen, 8 beste Dritte)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/de/watch — offizieller Übertragungs-Guide

## Pages en français / French pages (fr)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/fr/ — accueil : matchs et prédictions du jour
- https://www.wc2026.cool/fr/forecast — probabilités de qualification et de titre (modèle en direct)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/fr/forecast/best-thirds — classement des meilleurs troisièmes (les 8 premiers se qualifient)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/fr/calculator — calculateur de scénarios de qualification des troisièmes
- https://www.wc2026.cool/fr/rules — format et règles de qualification de la Coupe du monde 2026 (48 équipes, 12 groupes, 8 meilleurs troisièmes)
- https://www.wc2026.cool/fr/watch — guide officiel de diffusion

## Notes
- All numbers are model estimates for entertainment, not advice.
- Method: team strength ratings + public forecasting data, Poisson score model, 10,000 Monte Carlo runs, 2026 official tie-breakers.
